key.name: toggle-dropdown
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to show/hide the dropdown terminal

key.name: terminal
key.description: Terminal emulator to use: 'auto' detects the best available, or choose a specific terminal

key.name: terminal-args
key.description: Additional arguments passed to the terminal emulator

key.name: startup-command
key.description: Command to run inside the terminal on launch (e.g., 'tmux new-session -A -s main'). Leave empty for a default shell.

key.name: width-percent
key.description: Width of the dropdown as percentage of monitor width

key.name: height-percent
key.description: Height of the dropdown as percentage of monitor height

key.name: monitor
key.description: Monitor to show terminal on: 'current', 'primary', or monitor index

key.name: fullscreen
key.description: Maximize the terminal to fill the entire work area (respects panel/dock)

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration of the slide animation in milliseconds (0 to disable)

key.name: follow-mouse
key.description: When enabled, terminal appears on the monitor where the mouse cursor is located

key.name: smart-context-switch
key.description: When terminal is visible on another monitor/workspace, shortcut moves it here instead of hiding

key.name: always-on-top
key.description: Keep the terminal window above other windows

key.name: auto-hide-on-focus-loss
key.description: Automatically hide the terminal when it loses focus

key.name: hide-from-taskbar
key.description: Hide the terminal window from the taskbar/dash/panel

key.name: remove-keybinding-conflicts
key.description: Automatically remove IBus and input-source keybindings that conflict with the toggle shortcut
